title: Claude Fable 5逆向DOS游戏30分钟移植iPhone
full_text:
Ammaar Reshi on X: "I asked Claude Fable 5 to reverse engineer a 1993 DOS game with no source code.
It read the raw machine code, rewrote the engine in C, and gave me a fully editable port for every platform.
30 min from EXE to iPhone.
Sharing it all so you can revive your own childhood games! https://t.co/hzKro2BsU6" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Ammaar Reshi
@ammaar
I asked Claude Fable 5 to reverse engineer a 1993 DOS game with no source code.
It read the raw machine code, rewrote the engine in C, and gave me a fully editable port for every platform.
30 min from EXE to iPhone.
Sharing it all so you can revive your own childhood games!
00:00
5:49 PM · Jun 12, 2026 51.7K Views

discovery_record.discovery_summary: 我让Claude Fable 5逆向工程了一款1993年的DOS游戏，没有源代码。 它读取了原始机器码，用C重写了引擎，并给了我一个完全可编辑的移植版，适用于每个平台。 从EXE到iPhone，30分钟。 分享这一切，让你也能复活自己的童年游戏！
